ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "config_options" TEXT /* Configuration options for the task (e.g., calculation mode, derivative generator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., created, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option */,
  "config_group" TEXT /* Group of related configuration options */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of configuration options within a group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_options_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derivative_generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derivative generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the derivative generator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the derivative generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrators" (
  "integrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrator */,
  "integrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the performance statistic */,
  "stat_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance statistic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the task */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent task */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_config_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration option */,
  "option_example" TEXT /* Example value for the configuration option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_config_options_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the calculation mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation mode */,
  "mode_example" TEXT /* Example usage of the calculation mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrator_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "integrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integrator */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "option_default" TEXT /* Default value for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrator_options_integrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("integrator_id") REFERENCES integrators ("integrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derivative_generator_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derivative generator */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "option_range" TEXT /* Valid range of values for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derivative_generator_options_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES derivative_generators ("generator_id")
)
